title: The forkhead transcription factor FKH-7/FOXP acts in C. elegans chemosensory neurons to shape a life history strategy
summary: Human FOXP1 functionally substitutes for C. elegans FKH-7 in chemosensory neurons. A hypomorphic missense mutation associated with human NDD (social interaction deficits) reduces adaptive response frequency. Single-cell transcriptomics identifies candidate genes for variant-specific molecular pathology at single-neuron resolution. Direct functional characterization of a FOXP1 NDD variant in a model organism.
